ready_for_verification_description: Une {count} zvapupu zvakasimbiswa. AFROLOC yako inogona kusimbiswa zvino.
verification_options_description: Sarudza kubva munzira dzakawanda dzekusimbisa kuti usimbise kuzivikanwa kwako.
primary_residence_info: Iyi ndiyo kero yako yepamutemo yekusimbiswa nevabati
about_description: Kushandura kero dzedhijitari muAfrica kuburikidza nehunyanzvi hunosanganisira vese, kutsigirwa kwenharaunda uye georeferencing yakanyatsonaka.
mission_text: Kupa muAfrica wese kero yedhijitari yakasiyana, inosimbiswa uye inogara, ichikurudzira kubatanidzwa kwemari, kuwana masevhisi anokosha uye kusimbaradza kuzivikanwa kwezvikamu.
vision_text: Kuva hurongwa hwekero dzedhijitari hwezvikamu hwakakurumbira, huchiunganidza vanhu veAfrica vanopfuura bhiriyoni 1 uye huchishanda sechinhu chakakosha chekusimudzira nharaunda zvisingagumi.
values_subtitle: Mwedzi yakakosha inoratidza sarudzo dzese nemabasa
value_inclusion_desc: Tinobvuma kuti muAfrica wese akafanirwa nekero yedhijitari inosimbiswa, pasinei nezvinzvimbo kana mamiriro ehupenyu hwake.
value_security_desc: Tinodzivirira kuzivikanwa uye kusazivikanwa kwevashandisi kuburikidza nekutsigirwa kwenharaunda uye encryption yakasimba.
value_community_desc: Hurongwa hunotsigirwa nenharaunda pachayo, huchivimbisa chokwadi uye huchisimbaradza ukama hwenharaunda.
value_interoperability_desc: Tinovaka hurongwa hwezvikamu hunoshanda kunze kwemiganhu, huchiunganidza Africa yese.
journey_subtitle: Kubva pane zvinodiwa kuenda pachokwadi chezvikamu
team_subtitle: Vanhu vakazvipira kushandura kero dzedhijitari muAfrica
cta_about_description: Iva chikamu cheshanduko inoshandura kero dzedhijitari muAfrica
timeline_conception_desc: Kutanga kwekusimudzira pfungwa yekero dzedhijitari dzezvikamu kuAfrica
timeline_prototyping_desc: Kusimudzira muenzaniso wekutanga uye kuedza nenharaunda kuAngola
timeline_community_validation_desc: Kushandiswa kwehurongwa hwekutsigira hwezvapupu uye maturati ekubvumirwa
timeline_regional_expansion_desc: Kutanga munyika dzakawanda dzeAfrica nerutsigiro rwemitauro yakawanda
timeline_financial_integration_desc: Kubatana nezvirongwa zvemari kuti vabatanidzwe mubhengi
timeline_public_api_desc: Kutanga kweAPI yakavhurika kune vanovaka uye mabhizinesi
team_ceo_desc: PhD muGeographic Information Systems, makore 15 eruzivo mudigital infrastructure yeAfrica.
team_cto_desc: Yaimbove mukuru engineer weGoogle Maps, akazvipira mugeorefencing uye masisitimu akawanda.
team_community_desc: Akatungamira mapurojekiti ekubatanidza dhijitari munyika 12 dzeAfrica, anoziva mitauro 6 yeAfrica.
team_engineering_desc: Mugadziri wemasisitimu ane ruzivo mumapuratifomi makuru neblockchain.
admin_security_notice: Mukova uyu wekupinda ndewevadzori vehurongwa chete. Kuyedza kwese kupinda kunonyorwa uye kunoongororwa.
max_attempts_exceeded: Kuyedza kwakanyanya kwapfuura. Kumbira kodhi itsva.
download_app_subtitle: Wana maitiro ekuziva kero zvinobva pafoni yako
contact_subtitle: Tiri muAfrica yese. Sarudza dunhu rako utibate.
subject: Musoro
faq_subtitle: Tsvaka mhinduro kumibvunzo yakajairika pamusoro peAFROLOC
ios_safari_required: Kuisa appu iyi paiOS, UNOFANIRA kushandisa bhurauza yeSafari. Kana uchishandisa bhurauza imwe (Chrome, Firefox, nezvimwe), ndapota vhura link iyi muSafari kutanga.
scan_qr_code: Sikena Kodhi yeQR nekamera yefoni yako
qr_instructions: Nangerera kamera yefoni yako kukodhi iri pamusoro uye tevera mirayiridzo kuisa appu
ios_attention: CHENJERERA: Ita shuwa kuti uri kushandisa Safari
ios_step1: Vhura saiti iyi muSafari (bhurauza chaiyo yeiPhone)
ios_step2: Dzvanya bhatani rekugoverana (chiratidzo cheskweya chine museve uchinongedzera kumusoro) pazasi peskrini
ios_step3: Fambisa pasi mumenu uye dzvanya "Wedzera kuHome Screen"
ios_step5: Zvapera! Chiratidzo cheappu chichaonekwa paskrini yako yepamba
use_smartphone: Shandisa foni yako kuti uwane ruzivo rwakanaka
scan_qr_above: Kana sikena Kodhi yeQR iri pamusoro nefoni yako
pwa_no_store: Progressive Web App (PWA) - Haikudi kudhawunirodha kubva mutoro yeappu
install_subtitle: Wana appu zvakananga kubva paskrini yako yepamba, inoshanda usina intaneti!
benefit_quick_access_desc: Tangira zvakananga kubva paskrini yepamba seappu yechokwadi
benefit_offline_desc: Wana data yako kunyangwe usina intaneti
benefit_native_exp_desc: Chiso chakagadzirirwa foni, pasina bhuri rebhurauza
ios_install_step1: Dzvanya bhatani rekuGovera (skweya ine museve unongedzera kumusoro) muSafari
ios_install_step2: Fambisa pasi uye dzvanya "Wedzera kuHome Screen"
ios_install_step4: Chiratidzo cheAFROLOC chichaonekwa paskrini yako yepamba
android_install_step1: Dzvanya menu (madota matatu) pakona yepamusoro kurudyi yeChrome
android_install_step4: Chiratidzo cheAFROLOC chichaonekwa paskrini yako yepamba
pwa_preview_note: PWA inoshanda zvakanaka appu yapepetwa. Mupreview, zvimwe zvinhu zvinogona kuva nemutariro.
publish_instructions: Dzvanya bhatani re"Publish" muAFROLOC kuwana URL yekushanda. Wobva wawana URL iyoyo uye chiratidzo chekuisa chichaonekwa chingoita.
select_access_description: Sarudza nzira yaunoda kupinda nacho muhurongwa
hero_description: Chiratidzo chedhijitari chakasiyana uye chinogona kusimbiswa chemugari wese weAfrica nekero, kusimudzira kubatanidzwa, kushanda zvakanaka uye kushandira pamwe.
why_description: Mazana emamiriyoni evaAfrica — zvimwe kupfuura mamiriyoni 500 — havana kero chaiyo
feature_addressing_desc: Kunongedza nzvimbo zvakananga kunyange munzvimbo dzisina migwagwa ine mazita
feature_apis_desc: Kubatanidza zviri nyore nemafintechs, masevhisi eposvo uye hurumende yedhijitari
step1_desc: Ratidza imba yako nezviyero zveGPS kuburikidza nechirongwa chemucheka. Hurongwa hunogadzira kodhi yeAFROLOC yenguva pfupi zvichienderana nenzvimbo yako nezvimiro zvekutonga.
step2_desc: Vavakidzani vatatu nemutungamiriri wenzvimbo vanosimbisa imba yako. Kusimbisa kunoitwa kuburikidza neSMS kana kusaina kwedhijitari.
step3_desc: Kugadzirisa kwega kuburikidza nezviziviso zvenguva nenguva (mwedzi 6-18 zvichienderana nenzvimbo). Shanduko dzese dzinorekodwa nechitambu chenguva.
cta_description: Batana nezviuru zvevaAfrica vane kero dzedhijitari dzakasimbiswa
address_type_formal_desc: Kero ine zita remugwagwa uye nhamba yakavimbika
address_type_informal_desc: Kero isina zita remugwagwa kana nhamba yakavimbika
footer_proposal: Kurudziro yekuendeswa kuAfrican Union neSmart Africa Alliance
onboarding_description: Sarudza zvese zvinoshanda. Izvi zvinobatsira kuti tigadzirire ruzivo rwako.
language_updated_desc: Mutauro wakashandurwa zvega zvichienderana nenyika yakasarudzwa
basic_info_desc: Isa nyika yako nenzvimbo yawuri kuti tigadzirire ruzivo rwako
location_permission_denied: Mvumo yenzvimbo yakarambwa. Ndapota vhura GPS.
location_error: Kukanganisa pakutsvaga nzvimbo. Ndapota edza zvakare.
forgot_password_description: Isa imeiri yako uye tichakutumira link yekuchinja shoko rekuvhura rako
reset_email_sent_description: Tarisa imeiri yako uye utevere mirairo yekuchinja shoko rekuvhura rako
didnt_receive_email: Hauna kuwana imeiri? Tarisa folda yako yespam kana edza zvakare.
password_too_short: Shoko rekuvhura rinofanira kuva nemavara 6 chidikidiki
invalid_reset_link: Link yekuchinja haina kufanira kana yapera
challenge_desc: Mazana emamiriyoni evaAfrica — zvimwe kupfuura mamiriyoni 500 — havana kero pamutemo
challenge_step1_desc: MuKinshasa, Lagos, Luanda nemamwe maguta eAfrica, mamiriyoni anogara pasina kero pamutemo
challenge_step2_desc: Ambulance hadzisvikawo, tsamba dzinorasika, kuendesa hazvigoneki
challenge_step3_desc: Mabhanga eAfrica anoda umboo hwekugara hwusina vanhu vazhinji
challenge_step4_desc: Yakagadzirwa kune uye neAfrica, ichikudza chokwadi chedu chemaguta
addressing_desc: Kunongedza nzvimbo zvakananga kunyange munzvimbo dzisina migwagwa ine mazita
addressing_step1_desc: Munharaunda dzekunze kweLuanda kana commune yeKinshasa, GPS inowana imba yako
addressing_step2_desc: Chakagadziridzwa kuzvikamu zvenyika imwe neimwe: matunhu, mataundi, zvikamu, nharaunda
addressing_step3_desc: AO-LUA-VIA-RAM-Q12-U45 inoratidza nzvimbo yako yekugara nekusingaperi
addressing_step4_desc: Inoshanda neinternet inotyoka-tyoka, inowanzoitika mumaguta akawanda eAfrica
validation_step1_desc: Mushandi weutungamiri hwenzvimbo anoshanyira nharaunda uye anonyoresa vagari
validation_step2_desc: Anounganidza kunyoresa 50-100 kubva kunharaunda imwe chete kuti vasimbise pamwe chete
validation_step3_desc: Vatungamiriri venzvimbo vanoziva nharaunda uye vanosimbisa kuvimbika
validation_step4_desc: Hunokwira kusvika kumataundi, dunhu, huchichengeta cheni yekuvimba yeAfrica
financial_desc: Kuwana masevhisi emabhanga, chikwereti neinishuwarenzi muAfrica
financial_step1_desc: BAI, BCI, Ecobank vanogamuchira AFROLOC kuvhura maaccount evatengi
financial_step2_desc: Masangano ekubatana eAfrica anogona kuwana vatengi vadiki
financial_step3_desc: M-Pesa, Orange Money zvinobatanidza kubhadhara kwedhijitari nekero yepanyama
financial_step4_desc: Makambani einishuwarenzi eAfrica anopa kudzivirira kune avo vasina kumbowana
verification_step1_desc: Luanda, Lagos, Kinshasa anokura nekukurumidza: kusimbisa kaviri pagore rimwe
verification_step2_desc: Nzvimbo dzemaguta dzakadzikama: kugadzirisa kwegore rimwe nerimwe kwakaringana
verification_step3_desc: Chiziviso kuburikidza nenzira dzinozivikanwa muAfrica kana nguva yekusimbisa yasvika
verification_step4_desc: Mumiriri wenharaunda anoshanyira kana mugari anosimbisa paposta yeutungamiri
interop_step1_desc: Chiyero chinobvumirwa neAU chinoshanda kubva kuCairo kusvika kuCape Town
interop_step2_desc: Nyika imwe neimwe inochengeta chimiro chayo: wilaya, région, dunhu, estado
interop_step3_desc: Inoita kuti kutengeserana kuve nyore munharaunda dzehupfumi dzenzvimbo dzeAfrica
interop_step4_desc: UN, World Bank, DHL vanoziva AFROLOC sekero yakarurama
apis_step1_desc: REST API ine mienzaniso yevagadziri veAfrica kuti vabatanidze nyore
apis_step2_desc: Flutterwave, Paystack, Yoco vanosimbisa kero munguva chaiyo
apis_step3_desc: Mapuratifomu ekutengeserana e-indaneti eAfrica anoshandisa AFROLOC pakuendesa
apis_step4_desc: Matanho ehurumende eAfrica anobatanidza zvinyorwa zvevagari nemitero
gpsDiscrepancyDescription: Nzvimbo yemudziyo haisi kufanana nenzvimbo yemufananidzo. Izvi zvinogona kuratidza kupindira.
country_configuration_desc: Gadzirisa zviratidziro zvenyika zvakakosha zvehurongwa hweAFROLOC
create_first_afroloc: Gadzira AFROLOC yako yekutanga kuti utange
delete_user_confirm: Chokwadi chaunoda kudzima mushandisi uyu? Chiito ichi hachigoni kudzorerwa.
invalid_code: Kodhi haina kufanira. Ndapota edza zvakare.
location_permission_desc: Tinoda kuwana nzvimbo yako kuti tigadzire AFROLOC yako
review_information: Ndapota ongorora ruzivo rwako usati watumira
temporary_code: Kodhi yenguva pfupi - ichapera kana yabvumidzwa
about_description: AFROLOC ihurongwa hwechitupa chedhijitari hwakagadzirwa kupa kero yakasimbiswa nechitupa kuvaAfrica vese.
mission_description: Kuita kuti mugari wese weAfrica ave nekero yedhijitari yakasimbiswa, ichivapa mukana wekuwana masevhisi emari, kugamuchira zvinotumidzwa, uye kuva neumboo hwekugara pamutemo.
vision_description: Africa isina kusiyirwa nekuda kwekushayikwa kwekero yakavimbika. Tinoona Africa ine chitupa chedhijitari chinovhura mikana kune munhu wese.
contact_description: Une mibvunzo kana mazano? Tinoda kunzwa kubva kwauri.
message_error: Kukanganisa pakutumira shoko. Ndapota edza zvakare.
faq_description: Wana mhinduro kumibvunzo inowanzoita pamusoro peAFROLOC
faq_what_is_afroloc_answer: AFROLOC ihurongwa hwechitupa chedhijitari hunogadzira kodhi yekero yakasiyana yenzvimbo yese muAfrica, kunyange nzvimbo dzisina kero dzemigwagwa dzakajairika.
faq_how_works_answer: AFROLOC inoshandisa zviyero zveGPS, hurongwa hweutungamiri hwenyika, uye kusimbisa kwenharaunda kugadzira kodhi yekero yakasiyana inogona kusimbiswa uye iripo nekusingaperi.
faq_who_can_use_answer: Munhu wese anogara muAfrica anogona kugadzira AFROLOC. Hurongwa hwakagadzirwa kuti huwanikwe nyore kushandiswa nomunhu wese.
faq_is_free_answer: Hongu, kugadzira AFROLOC yako yekutanga mahara zvakakwana. Masevhisi ekuwedzera anogona kuva nezvibhadharo zvidiki munguva iri kuuya.
faq_verification_answer: Kusimbisa kunoitwa kuburikidza nechisanganiswa chenzvimbo yeGPS, kusimbiswa nezvapupu zvevavakidzani, uye kubvumirwa nevatungamiriri venzvimbo kana zvichikosha.
offline_message: Uri mumugariro wekusabatana. Mamwe masevhisi angasashanda.
install_prompt_description: Isa AFROLOC papamhene yako yekutanga kuti uwane nekukurumidza uye ruzivo rwiri nani.
delete_account_warning: Chiito ichi hachigoni kudzorerwa. Izvi zvichadzima akaunti yako nedata yese yakabatana nekusingaperi.
data_exported: Data yako yatumwa kunze. Kudhawunilodha kuchatanga munguva pfupi.
import_description: Unza zvikamu zveutungamiri kubva pafaira reCSV kana Excel
template_description: Dhawunilodha tembureti yeCSV kuti uone fomati yakarurama
confirm_witness_description: Wakumbirwa kusimbisa kuti unoziva mugari pano pakero iyi.
title: Musoro
name: Zita
label: Chitadzo
gps_spoofing_description: Musiyano waonekwa pakati penzvimbo yeGPS yemudziyo nezviyero zvemufananidzo
gps_recommendation_caution: Kuchenjera kunokurudzirwa. Funga pamusoro pokusimbisa kwakawedzera.
gps_recommendation_reject: Njodzi yakakura. Funga kuramba kunyoresa uku.
address_limit_warning: Wasvika pamuganho wemakero 3 eAFROLOC. Kuti uwedzere kero itsva, ndapota dzima imwe yeiripo.
duplicate_address_error: Kero yeAFROLOC iripo kare ine nzvimbo imwechete nerudzi rwezvivakwa. Shandisa rudzi rwakasiyana (nzvimbo yekugara, yekutengeserana, munda, nezvimwe).
otp_expired: Kodhi yeOTP yapera. Ndapota kumbira itsva.
change_phone_description: Chinja nhamba yefoni yakabatanidzwa neakaunti yako
phone_change_cooldown: Unogona kuchinja nhamba yefoni yako mushure memazuva
about_page_description: AFROLOC ihurongwa hwekero yedhijitari hunobatsira vaAfrica kuwana chitupa chekero pamutemo.
install_page_description: Isa AFROLOC pachishandiso chako kuti uwane ruzivo ruri nani
auto_delete_notice: Zvinhu mumarara zvichadzimwa zvega mushure memazuva 30
complete_your_profile: Pedzisa profairi yako kuti uvhure zvinhu zvese
address_update_description: Zadza nzvimbo dziri pasi kana mugwagwa wako wapihwa zita rekufanira kana imba yako yapihwa nhamba yakagoverwa nehurumende yepadenho. System ichange mhando yekero kubva kune isiri formal kuenda kune formal.
address_type_explanation: Mushure mekuzadza zita remugwagwa UINE nhamba, kero ichanzi Formal. Kana zvisina kudaro, ichava Isiri Formal. Kero ichava Digital chete mushure mekusimbiswa nevanobata.
public_address_confirmed: Kero yako yasimbiswa. Kero yakasimbiswa zvakanaka.
public_contact_services: Nzira yako inoda kusimbiswa kwakawedzera. Ndapota bata masevhisi edu.
delete_address_warning: Wava nechokwadi chekuti unoda kudzima kero iyi yeAFROLOC? Chiito ichi hachigone kudzoserwa.
mitigation_property_monitoring: Rudzi rwezvinhu urwu runoda kutarisirwa kwakawanda
mitigation_low_ats: Mapoint eATS akaderera - kuongororwa kakawanda kunodikanwa
witnesses_required_message: Unoda zvisingazombopfuuri {count} zvapupu zvakasimbiswa kuti usimbise AFROLOC yako
witness_contract_legal_note: Chapupu ichi chakasaina chibvumirano chemutemo chichisimbisa kuti vanoziva mugari pachavo uye vanosimbisa kuti ruzivo rwekero rwakapihwa nderwechokwadi. Siginicha ine simba remutemo.
waiting_for_witness_confirmation: Takamirira chapupu kuti chisimbise uye chisaine chibvumirano
once_witnesses_confirm_authority_validat: Zvapupu zvakasimbisa, mutongi anogona kusimbisa AFROLOC yako
upload_manage_documents_desc: Isa uye gadzirira zvinyorwa zvako zvekusimbisa kuzivikanwa
upload_documents_to_verify: Isa zvinyorwa zvekuzivikanwa kuti usimbise AFROLOC yako
quick_action_verify_desc: Uchaendeswa kuti utange nzira yekusimbisa kero itsva yeAFROLOC.
quick_action_report_desc: Uchaendeswa kunzvimbo yekugadzira nekuona mishumo yemabasa.
no_record_found_desc: Kero yaunoda haina kuwanikwa kana haipo. Tarisa chiratidzo uedze zvakare, kana dzokera kurutivi rwemakero.
no_reports_desc: Hapana kusimbiswa kwakarekodwa munguva yakasiyanwa. Gadzirisa nguva yekuongorora kana mirira kusimbiswa kutsva kupedzwa.
no_users_found_desc: Hapana vashandisi vanobatana nezvinodikanwa zvekutsvaga. Edza kugadzirisa zviyero kana kutsvaga kwako.
